problem id: 7aa4fdf0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  11110001 -> 00010111
  00111110 -> 00000011
  01011100 -> 00000101
  11110101 -> 01010111
  11100001 -> 00010110
  11001011 -> 10100100
  11101111 -> 10000110
  11110100 -> 01001111
  00100001 -> 00010010

query: 00010000
predicted answer: 00000001
